thread.agentDoneNoText: Future Agent finished but returned no text.
thread.alreadyRunning: A response is already in progress for this conversation.
thread.responseInterrupted: The response was interrupted before it finished.

failure.connect:
Future Agent connection failed: {{message}}

Make sure the agent is running and FUTURE_AGENT_GRPC_ADDR points to 127.0.0.1:50051.

agentUnavailable.title: Future Agent is not running
agentUnavailable.detail: Start Future Agent first, then click Retry.

modelError.title: Failed to load models
modelError.detail: The agent is reachable, but the model list could not be fetched.

needsLogin.title: No model configured
needsLogin.detail: Connected to Future Agent, but no models are available yet. Sign in with FutureOS, or configure your own API provider (OpenAI, DeepSeek, etc.).

noModels.title: No models available
noModels.detail: A provider is configured, but the model list is empty. Check that models are enabled, or verify your account quota / permissions.

allModelsDisabled.title: All models disabled
allModelsDisabled.detail: Models are loaded, but you've disabled all of them in Settings. Enable at least one.

composer.placeholder: Ask Future Copilot to plan, research, analyze, edit, or prepare a workflow...
composer.startAgentForModels: Start Future Agent to load models.
composer.allModelsDisabled: Models are loaded but all disabled. Enable one in Settings.

attachment.imageUnreadable: {{name}} cannot be read or decoded as an image
attachment.fileMissing: File has been moved or deleted: {{name}}
attachment.originalMissing: Original image is missing or damaged

newConversation.placeholder: Ask Future Copilot to plan, research, analyze, edit, or prepare a workflow...
newConversation.workspaceHint: Uses this project folder and its workspace resources.
newConversation.chatHint: Starts quickly with a temporary workspace managed by FutureOS.

modal.displayNameOpen: Display name (optional, defaults to selected directory)

newConversation.workspaceExists: "{{name}}" already exists; the existing workspace will be opened.

approval.readSummary: Agent wants to read a protected file.
approval.writeSummary: Agent wants to modify a protected file.
approval.outsideWriteSummary: Agent wants to modify a file outside the workspace.
approval.shellSummary: Agent wants to run a shell command.
approval.escalationTitle: Run this command outside the sandbox
approval.unsandboxedNote: If allowed, this command runs once without sandbox restrictions.
approval.ruleSaveWorkspace: Auto-allow operations matching this path in this workspace (written to .future/approval_rule.json, editable)
